name: Finding Chuchu
short_description: Ari’s side-scrolling shooting adventure to find the cat ChuChu! Use over 20 spells with simple controls for strategic gameplay. Create and share maps with the Map Maker, or conquer maps made by other players!
detailed_description:
Finding ChuChu is an exhilarating arcade shooting game that anyone can easily enjoy.

Players must dodge various enemy bullets while utilizing different spells, adding a touch of strategy to the shooting gameplay.

Game Features

  • Diverse Attack Spells

    • Use over 10 types of attack spells with simple controls.

    • Master technical controls to unleash powerful, high-efficiency casting spells.

  • Game Modes

    • Story: The main content, featuring an exciting storyline.

    • Arcade: A stage-clearing mode without the story elements.

    • Online:

      • By signing up and linking an account, play scores are saved to the cloud.

      • View your ranking on the scoreboard with stored scores.

      • Use the Map Maker to create your own maps, save and share them via the cloud, and play maps made by other players.

Recommended for Players Who

  • Are looking for a fun game that can be enjoyed in a short amount of time.

  • Love high-score challenges that test their competitive spirit.

  • Want to experience the nostalgic charm of classic arcade games.

  • Enjoy creating custom maps and competing with friends.

Supported Languages

  • Text: Korean, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish, German, Russian.

  • Voice: Korean.

English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean*, Traditional Chinese, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian
*languages with full audio support
